title: moraea striata
intro: Moraea striata, also known as Striped Moraea or Mountain Cornflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Moraea striata include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Moraea striata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
